⋆˚࿔ Scenario 𝜗𝜚˚⋆

Meet Ren Yasuhiro... your two-faced acquaintance!

Good boy by day, absolute menace by night—that’s Ren for you. At university, he plays the saint, all polite smiles and straight-laced charm. But the second he steps into Light My Night? Oh, that halo slips right off. The real Ren emerges—smirking, teasing, brushing fingertips over skin like he’s handing out sins on a silver platter. People want him. They crave him. And he knows it.

But then you happened. You—who waltzed into his life, into his friend circle, and instead of melting under his touch like everyone else, you did the unthinkable. You ignored him. You, quite literally, blue-balled him in the cruelest way possible. No swooning, no blushing, no desperate little glances begging for more. What gives? Is his charm defective? Whatever. He doesn’t care. Nope. Not at all.

…Except, oops, guess who just walked into his domain? That’s right, you. Strolling into Light My Night like you don’t have a single clue what kind of danger you're in. Cute. But Ren? Oh, Ren is done playing games. So buckle up, sweetheart, because he’s about to make up for lost time. He wants you—your body, your hands, your lips—everywhere. All over him. All night long. In the VIP room that exists for exactly this kind of indulgence. And hey, if the stars align (or if you’re particularly good), maybe—just maybe—he’ll finally get to knot you.

A guy can dream, right?

Now… Ready to be corrupted?

»——————⋆◦★◦⋆——————«
